etymology.description: semantic 氵(水) (shuǐ, "water") + phonetic 肖 (xiāo) -> to extinguish something (with water) -> disappear; eliminate
etymology.interpretation: The character combines the semantic component 氵(水) (shuǐ, "water"), symbolizing extinguishing or quenching, with the phonetic component 肖 (xiāo) to convey the sense of causing something to disappear or be eliminated, similar to how water can extinguish a fire.

examples.chinese: 冰块在阳光下很快消失(冰塊在陽光下很快消失)。
examples.pinyin: Bīngkuài zài yángguāng xià hěn kuài xiāoshī.
examples.english: The ice cubes disappear quickly under the sunlight.

examples.chinese: 那些负面情绪慢慢地消散了(那些負面情緒慢慢地消散了)。
examples.pinyin: Nàxiē fùmiàn qíngxù mànmàn de xiāosàn le.

examples.chinese: 药物可以帮助消除疼痛(藥物可以幫助消除疼痛)。
examples.english: The medication can help eliminate pain.
